name: Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate frosting and confectioners' sugar in a large mixing bowl. Stir with a wooden spoon until thoroughly blended.
2. Cover each pecan half with one tablespoon of candy mixture. Roll into 1-inch balls; set aside. Chop the remaining pecans; set aside.
3. Place the chocolate chips and shortening in a 2-cup glass measuring cup. Microwave at MEDIUM (50% power) for 2 minutes; stir until smooth. Microwave for 1 minute longer at MEDIUM; stir until smooth. Dip one candy ball into the chocolate mixture until completely covered. Remove with a fork to a cooling rack. Sprinkle the top with chopped pecans. Repeat until all candy balls are covered. Allow to stand until the chocolate mixture is set.
- For peanut butter-flavored coating, place 1 cup peanut butter chips and 3 tbsp Crisco Shortening in a 2-cup glass measuring cup. Microwave at MEDIUM (50% power) for 2 minutes; stir until smooth. Dip candy balls as directed above.
Tip: Place waxed paper under the cooling rack to catch drips and make cleanup easy.
